arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah has just changed his tune about Liverpool future as contract uncertainty continues
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah has offered a fresh hint about his Liverpool future ahead of the Reds' trip to Man City

arts.ttl: Liverpool Premier League run in predicted as Arsenal title fight goes to final day
arts.sum: Arsenal are currently top of the Premier League, with Arsenal their main competitor in the race for the title.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher names surprise Arsenal star he wishes played for Liverpool
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher has insisted Liverpool's lead in the Premier League title race should be much larger, insisting that it would be if Arne Slot had one of Arsenal's star men in his squad

arts.ttl: Liverpool face PL competition to sign priority target in summer – Reds told to offer ‘hefty sum’
arts.sum: On Friday, UOL reported Liverpool have been scouting Flamengo’s Wesley França for over a year and have made an informal approach. There was also a suggestion the right-back could be a replacement for Trent Alexander-Arnold in the summer window. The latter’s contract expires in June and could join Real Madrid for free. Journalist Bruno Lemos, The post Liverpool face PL competition to sign priority target in summer – Reds told to offer ‘hefty sum’ appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Liverpool draw PSG, Arsenal face PSV, Villa meet Club Brugge in last 16
arts.sum: Liverpool will face Paris St-Germain in the Champions League last-16, while Arsenal take on PSV Eindhoven and Aston Villa will play Club Brugge.

arts.ttl: Anthony Taylor punished Arne Slot after Ibrahima Konate incident and had Cody Gakpo fuming
arts.sum: Anthony Taylor, who will take charge of Liverpool's showdown with Manchester City on Sunday, has been at the centre of some controversial moments involving the Reds

arts.ttl: Man City vs Liverpool Key Battles: Gonzalez to dominate Szoboszlai in midfield battleground?
arts.sum: Over recent years, whenever Liverpool and Manchester City have faced off, it’s been a top of the table clash. It has sometimes been dubbed a title decider. This time around, however, things are ...

arts.ttl: Arsenal's Premier League title chances officially over if Liverpool beat Man City, legend says
arts.sum: Arsenal's hopes of winning the Premier League will be over if Liverpool overcome Manchester City in Sunday's Premier League showdown, Ray Parlour tells Sports Mole.

arts.ttl: David Raya makes bold Liverpool claim as Arsenal title race 'confidence' revealed
arts.sum: Liverpool sit eight points above Arsenal, but the Gunners could reduce the deficit to five points with a win over West Ham on Saturday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Van Dijk sets alarm bells ringing at Liverpool with contract development
arts.sum: Previously, interest in Van Dijk was thought to largely come from developing markets, such as the Saudi Pro League or MLS, but now the player’s entourage are being told that there could be an opportunity for the veteran to have one last dance at a major European club. It is a development in Van Dijk’s case that is said to have “alarm bells starting to ring” at Liverpool, who are eager to tie the player down to a new contract.
